subject: new product type: us crude fin opt call and put

emails.subject: New Product Type: US Crude Fin Opt Call and Put
emails.subject_base: New Product Type: US Crude Fin Opt Call and Put
emails.body: New Product Type: US Crude Fin Opt Call and Put The product type long descriptions below will fall under the new product types US Crude Fin Option Call and US Crude Fin Option Put Credit (Tom Moran) has approved copying the profiles for the new product types from the following: US Crude WTI Fin Swap Please respond by 10 a.m. on Wednesday, March 21. Thank you. Lisa Forwarded by Lisa Lees/HOU/ECT on 03/20/2001 03:05 PM From: Melba Lozano 03/15/2001 02:04 PM
